title: Sengoku gunto-den
writer: Akira Kurosawa, Jûrô Miyoshi, Sadao Yamanaka
actors: Toshirô Mifune, Kôji Tsuruta, Yôko Tsukasa
plot: Lord Taro must deliver a money chest but is robbed by brigands led by Jibu. One of Jibu's men, Rokuro, steals the money from Jibu, but after meeting and befriending Taro, Rokuro decides to return the money to Taro. But Taro's unsc...
